debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
X1 X2 : Set ↑A
h : HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X1 = HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X2
⊢ X1 ⊆ X2

proof:
by
  define
  fix x : ↑A
  assume hx : x ∈ X1
  have hval : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by
    define
    exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at hval
  define at hval
  obtain ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩ := hval
  have heq : x = y := Subtype.ext hxy.symm
  rw [heq]
  exact hy

by
  define
  fix x : ↑A
  assume hx : x ∈ X1
  have hv : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by

    use x

    rfl
  rw [h] at hv
  define at hv
  obtain ⟨y, hy, hvy⟩ := hv
  have heq : x = y := Subtype.ext hvy.symm
  rw [heq]
  exact hy
